results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'A grateful mind, a healthier life' is a familiar wellness platitude with no specific payoff or contrarian angle to stop a scroll.
rationales.clarity: Each slide carries one idea and the three-things-per-day instruction is concrete and immediately actionable.
rationales.audience_fit: Gratitude content skews older/wellness-insider; a tired 25-year-old is more likely to scroll past than save it.
rationales.novelty: Gratitude journals and 'mind is part of health' framing are among the most saturated angles in wellness content.
rationales.brand_fit: Hedging is consistent ('may support', 'may help'), no hype words, CTA ties back to the score naturally, voice stays plain.
rationales.predicted_performance: Soft hook plus zero novelty means saves and shares will likely land well below average for the longevity niche.
